case_title: CHRISTIAN ARD VS. CALIFORNIA SECRETARY OF STATE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $40.00 FILED BY ARD, CHRISTIAN AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA SECRETARY OF STATE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-27-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-27-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-27-2023 BY JUDGE MURLENE J. RANDLE. PLAINTIFF CHRISTIAN ARD IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA SECRETARY OF STATE IS NOT PRESENT. COURT FINDS PLAINTIFF CLAIM DOES NOT MEET THE REQUIREMENT OF CALIFORNIA TORT CLAIMS ACT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MURLENE J. RANDLE; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL [AGENT FOR SERVICE - OFFICE OF THE ATTORNEY GENERAL] FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARD, CHRISTIAN AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA SECRETARY OF STATE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-19-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA SECRETARY OF STATE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-27-2023 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARD, CHRISTIAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA SECRETARY OF STATE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
